200.description: The list of data providers was retrieved successfully.

object.description: Indicates this is a list response.

id.description: The unique identifier of the provider.

name.description: The display name of the provider (e.g., "GitHub", "Slack").

description.description: A description of the provider explaining how it will be used, if configured.
description.example: Connect your GitHub account to access repositories.

slug.description: The slug identifier used in API calls (e.g., `github`, `slack`, `notion`).

credentials_type.description: The type of credentials used by the provider (e.g., `oauth2`).

scopes.description: The OAuth scopes configured for this provider, or `null` if none are configured.

auth_methods.description: The authentication methods supported by this provider (`oauth`, `api_key`, or both). Defaults to `["oauth"]` if absent.

ownership.description: Whether the provider is owned by a user or organization.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the provider was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the provider was last updated.

connected_account.description: The user's [connected account](/reference/pipes/connected-account) for this provider, or `null` if the user has not connected.

id.description: The unique identifier of the connected account.

user_id.description: The [User](/reference/authkit/user) identifier associated with this connection.

organization_id.description: The [Organization](/reference/organization) identifier associated with this connection, or `null` if not scoped to an organization.

scopes.description: The OAuth scopes granted for this connection.

auth_method.description: The authentication method used for this connection (`oauth` or `api_key`). Defaults to `oauth` if absent.

api_key_last_4.description: The last four characters of the API key, or `null` for OAuth connections.

state.description:
The state of the connected account:
- `connected`: The connection is active and tokens are valid.
- `needs_reauthorization`: The user needs to reauthorize the connection, typically because required scopes have changed.
- `disconnected`: The connection has been disconnected.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the connection was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the connection was last updated.

data.description: A list of [providers](/reference/pipes/provider), each including a [`connected_account`](/reference/pipes/connected-account) field with the user's connection status.

401.description: The request is missing a valid API key.

404.description: The user or organization was not found.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
